_comment: Species: Star-Eating Beast (噬星兽) from A World Worth Protecting. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Star-Eating Beast

canonical.appearance: Leviathan maw 1000 m, can swallow stars, body is cosmic hunger
canonical.size: 1000 m adult, planetary mass; true form swallows star systems
canonical.behavior: Cultivates by devouring stars; sleeps between meals for millennia
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: star_eating_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
